oidc.audience.longdesc: This value is required by some providers.
oidc.audience.shortdesc: Expected audience value for the application

oidc.issuer.shortdesc: OpenID Connect Discovery URL for the provider

global.address.longdesc: This value is optional. If set, it will be used as the address for the control network listener and will override member level addresses.
global.address.shortdesc: Address to bind a load balancer or authoritative DNS server to

https_address.longdesc: This value is required and is set during the manager installation process. Updating this setting may result in the member becoming unreachable.
https_address.shortdesc: Internal member address for the member control network listener

external_address.longdesc: This value is optional. If set, its value will be used as the reachable address for the member control network listener.
external_address.shortdesc: External address mapping to the internal address of the member control network listener
